caption: A screen recording captures a web browser window displaying several open tabs, including titles such as "Trust & Learning by Systemenity," "Future of Unity by Systemenity," and "Rural Community Food System." A video conferencing window is active in the top right corner, showing a man wearing a dark blue shirt and headphones. The main area of the screen features a dark background with a complex node-based diagram consisting of circles connected by lines. A smaller inset image shows a white background with blue rectangular boxes and connecting arrows. As the sequence progresses, the video conferencing window momentarily disappears and then reappears, showing the same man in the same position. The rest of the interface, including the browser tabs and the network diagram, remains static throughout the footage.
